MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT, CARMELO SGARLATO, CARRIE MALONEY'S Motion For Protective Order is transferred to the discovery calendar to be heard at 9:00 a.m. on the same date in department 301. San Francisco Unified School District, Carmelo Sgarlato, Carrie Maloney'S Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Sep-18-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

Defendants' San Francisco Unified School District, Carmelo Sgarlato, Carrie Maloney'S Motion For Protective Order is continued on the court's own motion to September 25, 2012 at 9:00 am. Moving party failed to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and is ordered to do so, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, to Department 302 no later than September 18, 2012 at 4:00 pm. Katherine Huibonhoa, Judge Pro-tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not reported. =302/JPT
